attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_PA_BUDGET_VERSIONS)

FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_BUDGET_VERSIONS STG_CSF_PA_BUDGET_VERSIONS,
 (
 select BUDGET_VERSION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_BUDGET_VERSIONS
 minus
 select BUDGET_VERSION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_PA_BUDGET_VERSIONS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.BUDGET_VERSION_ID = STG_CSF_PA_BUDGET_VERSIONS.BUDGET_VERSION_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_PA_BUDGET_VERSIONS.REFRESH_DATETIME
